parsed.production_notes: The top panel features an AI-generated robot avatar with slightly unnatural, repetitive hand movements and a perfectly static background. The bottom panel is standard human-recorded video.

characters.appearance: Female-presenting humanoid robot. Metallic silver casing with visible panel seams and articulated joints. Glowing blue eyes and a smooth, sculpted face.
characters.demeanor: Helpful, instructional, and slightly robotic in movement.

characters.appearance: Young Indian woman, medium build, brown complexion. Dark, shoulder-length wavy hair.
characters.wardrobe: White button-up shirt with a grey geometric pattern.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, transitioning from unsure to pleasantly surprised.

scenes.setting: Top: Traditional Indian living room. Bottom: Plain white wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits at a wooden desk facing the camera. The background is a warmly lit, traditional Indian room featuring wooden furniture, patterned cushions, and brass artifacts on a shelf. Character A makes conversational hand gestures while speaking.
Character B stands facing the camera against a plain, brightly lit white wall. She looks upwards towards the top panel, reacting with various facial expressions as she listens and responds.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with the AI robot on top and the human woman on the bottom. Dynamic text captions appear in the center of the screen, translating the spoken dialogue. A red 'X' and green checkmark graphic briefly appear over the top panel to indicate incorrect and correct grammar.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: உனக்கு எத்தனை brothers இருக்காங்க? [How many brothers do you have?]
Character B says: I am having two brothers.
Character A says: Having-ன்னு சொல்லக்கூடாது. நீ ரெண்டு பேரையும் கையில பிடிச்சிட்டு இருக்கியா என்ன? 'I have two brothers'-ன்னு தான் சொல்லணும். [You shouldn't say 'having'. Are you holding both of them in your hands? You should say 'I have two brothers'.]
Character B says: ஓ, ஓகே ஓகே. எனக்கு English அவ்ளோவா தெரியாது. [Oh, okay okay. I don't know English that well.]
Character A says: No problem. AI teachers-அ try பண்ணலையா? [No problem. Haven't you tried AI teachers?]
Character B says: அதெல்லாம் ரொம்ப செலவாகுமே. [That will be very expensive.]
Character A says: கண்டிப்பா இல்ல. எல்லாத்தையும் விட 7 மடங்கு cheap-ஆ இருக்கறதுனால தான் ஒரு கோடிக்கும் அதிகமானவங்க இன்னைக்கு MySivi-ல English practice பண்றாங்க. [Definitely not. Because it is 7 times cheaper than everything else, more than 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi today.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
உனக்கு எத்தனை brothers இருக்காங்க? (How many brothers do you have?)
I am having two brothers
Having-ன்னு சொல்லக்கூடாது (You shouldn't say 'having')
நீ ரெண்டு பேரையும் கையில பிடிச்சிட்டு இருக்கியா என்ன (Are you holding both of them in your hands?)
'I have two brothers'-ன்னு தான் சொல்லணும் (You should say 'I have two brothers')
ஓ, ஓகே ஓகே (Oh, okay okay)
எனக்கு English அவ்ளோவா தெரியாது (I don't know English that well)
No problem
AI teachers-அ try பண்ணலையா (Haven't you tried AI teachers?)
அதெல்லாம் ரொம்ப செலவாகுமே (That will be very expensive)
கண்டிப்பா இல்ல (Definitely not)
எல்லாத்தையும் விட 7 மடங்கு cheap-ஆ இருக்கறதுனால தான் (Because it is 7 times cheaper than everything else)
ஒரு கோடிக்கும் அதிகமானவங்க (more than 1 crore people)
இன்னைக்கு MySivi-ல English practice பண்றாங்க (are practicing English on MySivi today)

panels.panel_visual_description: A digital screen displaying a mobile application store page. The layout includes an app icon, title, download statistics, and a prominent install button. Below this, a promotional video thumbnail is visible.

scenes.visual_description: A screencast of the Google Play Store page for the 'MySivi AI' app. The screen scrolls slightly, showing the app name, rating, download count, and an 'Install' button.
scenes.on_screen_text:

scenes.setting: Top: Traditional Indian living room. Bottom: Plain white wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits at a wooden desk facing the camera. The background is a warmly lit, traditional Indian room featuring wooden furniture, patterned cushions, and brass artifacts on a shelf. Character A makes conversational hand gestures while speaking.
Character B stands facing the camera against a plain, brightly lit white wall. She looks upwards towards the top panel, reacting with various facial expressions as she listens and responds.

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen layout resumes. Dynamic text captions continue to appear. At one point, a large graphic of an analog clock fades in over the center of the screen, blurring the background slightly, before fading out.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: ஆனா time கிடைக்கிறது இல்ல. [But I don't get time.]
Character A says: தினமும் 15-லிருந்து 20 minutes practice பண்ணாலே போதும். Confident-ஆ English பேசலாம். [Practicing for 15 to 20 minutes daily is enough. You can speak English confidently.]
Character B says: வாவ்! நான் எப்படி join பண்றது? [Wow! How do I join?]
Character A says: Install button-அ tap பண்ணுங்க. Sign up பண்ணி practice ஆரம்பிங்க. வெறும் 15 நாள்லையே improvement தெரியும். Start Now. [Tap the install button. Sign up and start practicing. You will see improvement in just 15 days. Start Now.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ஆனா time கிடைக்கிறது இல்ல (But I don't get time)
தினமும் (Daily)
15-20 mins
15-லிருந்து 20 minutes practice பண்ணாலே போதும் (Practicing for 15 to 20 minutes is enough)
Confident-ஆ English பேசலாம் (You can speak English confidently)
வாவ் (Wow)
நான் எப்படி join பண்றது (How do I join?)
Install button-அ tap பண்ணுங்க (Tap the install button)
Sign up பண்ணி practice ஆரம்பிங்க (Sign up and start practicing)
வெறும் 15 நாள்லையே improvement தெரியும் (You will see improvement in just 15 days)
Start Now
